summary: Strong Buy consensus across ~38-42 analysts. Average PT ranges $260-$275 depending on source (consensus ~$266-$275). High PT $380, low PT $220. 94% of covering analysts have Buy rating. Stock last traded around $216, implying ~24-30% upside to consensus PT. Most recent PT reiteration $250 (March 31, 2026).
